summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CheckpointHub MVP - multi-tenant SaaS platform for workflow-driven service operations. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI functional with minor issues.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 403 'Super Admin access required' when updating user role via API testing
flaky_endpoints.impact: Session/cookie authentication not properly maintained in requests.Session()

ui_bugs.issue: Language toggle may not be switching content properly from EN to ES

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and features
Super Admin dashboard loads and displays stats
Create tenant functionality with modal form
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix language toggle functionality to properly switch content between EN/ES. Fix session authentication for admin user role updates API. Add aria-describedby to dialog components for accessibility.
